name: mimi-seed-sdk
description: Monorepo root — the SDK version (SSOT for both packages and client plugin manifests) plus bootstrap scripts. The publishable packages live in packages/. This is NOT an npm workspace: each package installs independently.

scripts.test: npm run plugin:check && npm test --prefix packages/mcp-server && npm test --prefix packages/cli
scripts.plugin:check: node scripts/sync-agent-guide.mjs --check && node scripts/sync-codex-plugin.mjs --check && node scripts/version.mjs --check
